channel.title: Session Manager on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in Session Manager on The Hidden Port

item.title: AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Explained: What This IAM Policy Does and When to Use It
item.description: A breakdown of the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore IAM policy — what permissions it grants, why your EC2 instances need it for Session Manager, and how to scope it down for production.

item.title: Securing EC2 Access with AWS Systems Manager Session Manager: Eliminating SSH
item.description: A comprehensive guide to replacing SSH access with AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for EC2 instances, enhancing security and compliance.
